title: hieracium stenogrammum
intro: Hieracium stenogrammum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium stenogrammum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Hieracium stenogrammum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
